news.name: Erratum of Sigismar & Wingspan
news.answer: As of February 12, 2026, Sigismar has been updated with the following text : "At Noon — Create an [Ordis Recruit 1/1/1] Soldier token in your Hero Expedition.  [Ignore my abilities during the first Day.]"  The previous version said "At Noon — Create an [Ordis Recruit 1/1/1] Soldier token in your Hero Expedition."
news.question: Did the text of this card change?
